title: Aspirator cartridge
abstract: An aspirator cartridge and an aspirator have new structures. An aspirator cartridge includes a heater unit configured to atomize a liquid in order to generate an aerosol. The heater unit includes: a liquid holding member that has a first surface and a second surface facing the first surface; a heater that comes in contact with the first surface of the liquid holding member; and a support member that supports the second surface of the liquid holding member and is softer than the liquid holding member.
claims: 1. A cartridge for an inhaler, comprising: a heater unit configured to atomize a liquid to generate aerosol, wherein the heater unit includes: a liquid holding member that has a first surface, and a second surface opposite the first surface; a heater that contacts the first surface of the liquid holding member; at least one electrode for supplying electric power to the heater; and a support member that supports the second surface of the liquid holding member and is softer than the liquid holding member, wherein the at least one electrode is configured to press the liquid holding member.
